name: Health insurance portability process
description: User wants to port their health policy to a new insurer

input.message: I have a Star Health policy for 3 years. I am unhappy with their service. I want to move to Niva Bupa. How do I port and will I lose my waiting period benefits?

notes: Portability right: IRDAI Health Insurance Portability 2011. Apply 45 days before renewal. Waiting period credit: new insurer must give credit for years already served. NCB should also be portable. Process: fill portability form, submit to new insurer, they process and accept/reject in 15 days.
